title: Tinkers' Create Diving Modifiers
description: Adds Create's diving helmet and boots as modifiers into Tinkers' Construct.
body:
# About
Adds 2 new **Tinkers' Construct** modifiers: _Diving Boots_ and _Diving Helmet_ which works the same as diving gear from **Create**. These modifiers use upgrade slots.

Best used with mod/datapack that allows equiping backtanks on **Curios**'s back slot. 

![Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a082231d72654590f5754b4aff3f0db6dd1e1195.png)
